creator: bergerkos@yahoo.co.uk
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #15)
There is no SAL| DESKTOP in my env.

env SAL_USE_VCLPLUGIN=gen libreoffice works fine and produces PDF as it should.
env SAL_USE_VCLPLUGIN=kf5 libreoffice doesn't, but then again my libreoffice was build with kf5=off.

Thank you!
